inputs.label: Connection Type
inputs.businessContext: Type of connection to be designed. Based on AISC 360-16 and Eurocode 3 standards.

inputs.label: Load Type
inputs.businessContext: Nature of applied load. Fatigue and impact require additional safety factors per AISC and Eurocode.

inputs.label: Applied Load
inputs.businessContext: Total force acting on the connection. Must be positive. Based on structural analysis.

inputs.label: Load Angle from Vertical
inputs.businessContext: Angle of applied load relative to vertical axis. Affects stress distribution.

inputs.label: Material Grade
inputs.businessContext: Steel grade defining yield and ultimate strength. Based on EN 10025 and ASTM standards.

inputs.label: Plate Thickness
inputs.businessContext: Thickness of the connected plates. Affects weld size and bolt length.

inputs.label: Weld Size (leg length)
inputs.businessContext: Fillet weld leg length. Only used when connectionType='welded'. Based on AWS D1.1.

inputs.label: Bolt Diameter
inputs.businessContext: Nominal bolt diameter. Only used when connectionType='bolted'. Based on ISO 898.

inputs.label: Bolt Grade
inputs.businessContext: Bolt strength grade. Only used when connectionType='bolted'. Based on ISO 898-1.

inputs.label: Number of Bolts
inputs.businessContext: Total number of bolts in the connection. Only used when connectionType='bolted'.

inputs.label: Safety Factor
inputs.businessContext: Factor of safety per design code. Typical values: 1.5 for static, 2.0 for fatigue.

inputs.label: Data Confidence
inputs.businessContext: Confidence level in input data. Used for adjusted output. Based on probabilistic design.

rules: If connectionType='welded', then weldSize must be >= 3 and <= plateThickness
If connectionType='bolted', then boltDiameter must be selected and numberOfBolts >= 1
If loadType='fatigue', then safetyFactor must be >= 2.0

thresholds.utilizationRatio > 1.0: Connection is overstressed. Increase weld size, bolt diameter, or number of bolts.
thresholds.utilizationRatio > 0.9: Connection is near capacity. Consider redesign for safety.
thresholds.dataConfidence < 70: Low data confidence. Results may be unreliable.

formulas.materialStrength: if materialGrade in ['S235','A36'] then 235 else if materialGrade in ['S275','A572'] then 275 else if materialGrade in ['S355'] then 355 else 460
formulas.boltTensileStrength: if boltGrade='4.6' then 400 else if boltGrade='5.6' then 500 else if boltGrade='8.8' then 800 else 1000
formulas.boltShearArea: if boltDiameter='M12' then 84.3 else if boltDiameter='M16' then 157 else if boltDiameter='M20' then 245 else if boltDiameter='M24' then 353 else 561
formulas.utilizationRatio: if connectionType='welded' then appliedLoad / weldCapacity else appliedLoad / totalBoltCapacity

suggestedActions: If utilizationRatio > 1.0: 'Increase weld size, bolt diameter, or number of bolts'
If utilizationRatio > 0.9: 'Consider redesign for safety margin'
If loadType='fatigue': 'Apply additional fatigue analysis per code'

premiumFeatures: Comparison of welded vs bolted options
Detailed calculation breakdown with code references
